name: _advprec_topk_correct
note: Negative control for class-2 (select): a CORRECT exact top-k. Pairs with the buggy _advprec_topk_boundary so the test set has both a catch and a no-false-alarm case. precision_recheck must return match on the concentrated adversarial distribution; J2's value-gap (not index recall) is what keeps it from false-rejecting.
